← All tools

Moon Calculator

Pick a place and a date to see moonrise, moonset, the moon's phase and how much of it is lit, plus where it sits in the sky at any moment. Everything is computed in your browser.

Location

    Date & time

    Moon at 12:00
    Altitude – Azimuth – Distance –

    Moon times & phase

    Moonrise
    –
    Moonset
    –
    Phase
    –
    –
    Moon age
    –
    of a 29.5-day cycle
    Next full moon
    –
    Next new moon
    –

    Phase, illumination and age are evaluated at 12:00 in the selected offset. Rise/set include the standard correction for lunar parallax and refraction (moon-centre altitude +0.125°).

    The moon today

    –

    Month at a glance

    Click a day to jump to it. green = today, badges mark full and new moon days (in the selected offset).

    Moon math uses truncated Meeus/NOAA series — rise & set are typically within a few minutes of almanac values, illumination within ~1%. Place search queries OpenStreetMap Nominatim; everything else stays in your browser. · a max tool
